name: No video of my work slip, case dead?

mainEntity.name: No video of my work slip, case dead?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, photos, witnesses, logs, and med records prove it in Idaho/Utah comp.** Video not required.[1] Key factors: (1) Your credible account; (2) Hazard existence; (3) Consistent story. Attorney subpoenas surveillance. Preserve scene.
